channel.title: Resilience-Testing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Resilience-Testing on Pi Stack

item.title: Toxiproxy vs Pumba vs Chaos Monkey: Self-Hosted Fault Injection Guide 2026
item.description: Building resilient distributed systems requires more than unit tests and load tests. You need to verify your applications survive real-world failures: network latency, dropped packets, service crashes, and infrastructure outages. Fault injection tools let you deliberately break things in staging environments so your production systems can handle failures gracefully.
